channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Why Dion Harris believes Nvidia’s energy-intensive chips could actually help the climate
item.description: It takes a ton of energy to train the most advanced AI. According to one estimate, by the year 2027, AI electricity needs could be comparable to the energy use of all of Argentina.
item.dc:creator: Issie Lapowsky, Fast Company

item.title: TikTok ban: 5 essential reads on the case and its concerns
item.description: A three-judge panel of the U.S. Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia Circuit on December 6, 2024, upheld a law requiring TikTok’s China-based parent company, ByteDance, to sell the video app by January 19, 2025, or face a nationwide ban on the app.
item.dc:creator: The Conversation, Fast Company

item.title: How to watch the I'm A Celeb final 2024 online from anywhere and for free
item.description: Coleen Rooney, Oti Mabuse, Danny Jones or Alan Halsall will be crowned the King or Queen of the Jungle. Here’s how you can watch the 2024 I'm A Celeb final online from anywhere.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: How 2025’s digital products will evolve
item.description: When most people hear “TikTok features,” there’s usually some eye-rolling involved. But after 17 years of helping companies navigate digital transformation, I’ve noticed something more profound happening.
item.dc:creator: Brad Weber, Fast Company

item.title: IAEA chief: Iran is poised to 'quite dramatically' increase stockpile of near weapons-grade uranium
item.description: MANAMA, Bahrain (AP) — Iran is poised to “quite dramatically” increase its stockpile of near weapons-grade uranium as it has started cascades of advanced centrifuges, the head of the International Atomic Energy Agency warned Friday.
item.dc:creator: JON GAMBRELL, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Federal appeals court upholds law requiring sale or ban of TikTok in the US
item.description: A federal appeals court panel on Friday unanimously upheld a law that could lead to a ban on TikTok as soon as next month, handing a resounding defeat to the popular social media platform as it fights for its survival in the U.S. The U.S.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: OpenAI releases o1 LLM, unveils ChatGPT Pro
item.description: OpenAI has officially released its OpenAI o1 large language model (LLM), built for complex reasoning. The company also introduced ChatGPT Pro, a $200 monthly plan that includes unlimited access to OpenAI o1, o1-mini, GPT-4o, and advanced voice conversations.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Breakthrough tech can no longer rely on CPUs
item.description: In 1993, Intel released the first Pentium processor. By today’s standards, it was primitive. At the time, it represented a major—and exciting—leap forward, even if it didn’t quite match the Macintosh’s Motorola 601 chip in sheer number-crunching performance.
item.dc:creator: Rodrigo Aramburu, Fast Company

item.title: Federal appeals court upholds law requiring sale or ban of TikTok in the US
item.description: A federal appeals court panel on Friday unanimously upheld a law that could lead to a ban on TikTok as soon as next month, handing a resounding defeat to the popular social media platform as it fights for its survival in the U.S. The U.S.
item.dc:creator: Haleluya Hadero, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: The EU makes an urgent TikTok inquiry on Russia's role in Romanian election turmoil
item.description: The European Union has sent TikTok an urgent request for more information about Romanian intelligence files suggesting that Moscow coordinated influencers on its platform to promote an election candidate who became the surprise front-runner in the nation’s presidential election.
item.dc:creator: Kelvin Chan, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Ally Financial finds gen AI success with 3 guiding principles
item.description: Bank holding company Ally Financial is determined to stay at the cutting edge of technology in the financial industry. Today, that means leveraging gen AI to transform its business.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Why the ‘one AI model to rule them all’ myth needs to die
item.description: Welcome to AI Decoded, Fast Company’s weekly newsletter that breaks down the most important news in the world of AI. You can sign up to receive this newsletter every week here.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: JDK 24: The new features in Java 24
item.description: Java Development Kit (JDK) 24 is now in an initial rampdown phase, with the feature set frozen at 24 features, ranging from a class-file API to a fourth preview of structured concurrency. JDK 24 reached the rampdown phase on December 5. It is due as a production release on March 18, 2025.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Google introduces PaliGemma 2 vision-language AI models
item.description: Google has introduced a new family of PaliGemma vision-language models, offering scalable performance, long captioning, and support for specialized tasks.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: AI glasses to help dementia patients aims to launch next year
item.description: “It’s continuously watching your visual environment and giving you assistance,” CareYaya CEO Neal Shah said.
item.dc:creator: Elizabeth Prann, NewsNation

item.title: TMF award to help OPM modernize COBOL code via AI
item.description: Guy Cavallo, the OPM CIO, said by using artificial intelligence to rewrite software code, the agency will need fewer programmers without losing oversight rigor. The post TMF award to help OPM modernize COBOL code via AI first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Biden Embracing Bitcoin to New Heights: A Shift in Washington's Stance
item.description: Bitcoin prices surge as Biden administration warms up to digital currencies, changing the game for investors and enthusiasts.
item.dc:creator: STAN CHOE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Joby Aviation receives FAA approval for flight academy
item.description: Joby Aviation, the Santa Cruz-based company developing electric air taxis for commercial passenger service, has received certification for its pilot training, in addition to having its voluntary safety management system accepted.
item.dc:creator: James Herrera, The Mercury News

item.title: 8 phishing email scams to watch out for this holiday season
item.description: Be on alert this holiday season for phishing emails. Kurt "CyberGuy" Knutsson shares several examples of fake phishing emails he's received in his inbox.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Get started with Azure AI Content Understanding
item.description: Modern AI is about a lot more than chatbots, as shown by Microsoft’s Ignite 2024 pivot to using its stable of large and small language models to power autonomous agents.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Bitcoin hits $100K after Trump names pro-crypto SEC chair
item.description: Bitcoin surged to more than $100,000 per coin on Wednesday after President-elect Trump announced Paul Atkins, a cryptocurrency aficionado, would be nominated to head the Security Exchange Commission (SEC). Google valued the coin at 102,726 U.S.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, The Hill

item.title: Meta to build $10 billion AI data center in Louisiana as Elon Musk expands his Tennessee AI facility
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — The largest artificial intelligence data center ever built by Facebook’s parent company Meta is coming to northeast Louisiana, the company said Wednesday, bringing hopes that the $10 billion facility will transform an economically neglected corner of the state. Republican Gov.
item.dc:creator: JACK BROOK and ADRIAN SAINZ, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: High Impact Service Providers in 2025: The State of Federal CX
item.description: Explore what’s next for HISP agencies as they transform customer, employee and total experience The post High Impact Service Providers in 2025: The State of Federal CX first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: Fortinet launches integrated cloud app security service
item.description: Fortinet has melded some of its previously available services into an integrated cloud package aimed at helping customers secure applications.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: How to bulk delete spam and old text messages on iPhone
item.description: Tech wizard Kurt "CyberGuy" Knutsson explains how to delete old unwanted texts and spam messages from cluttered inboxes of an iPhone in bulk.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 20 handy hidden tricks for Google Calendar on Android
item.description: Google Calendar is a core part of the Android productivity package — but if all you’re using is what you see on the app’s surface, you’re missing out on some pretty powerful possibilities. Yes, oh yes: Just like so many of our modern digital tools, there’s more to Google Calendar than meets the eye.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Founder of failed crypto lending platform Celsius Network pleads guilty to fraud charges
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The founder and former CEO of the failed cryptocurrency lending platform Celsius Network could face decades in prison after pleading guilty Tuesday to federal fraud charges, admitting that he misled customers about the business.
item.dc:creator: LARRY NEUMEISTER, Associated Press, NewsNation
